New Year's Day.description: Marks the first day of the Gregorian calendar year. Celebrated with countdown events and fireworks.
New Year's Day.description_ms: Menandakan hari pertama tahun kalendar Masihi. Disambut dengan acara kiraan detik dan bunga api.

Chinese New Year.description: Lunar New Year celebration marking the start of the Chinese calendar. Families reunite for reunion dinner (团圆饭), lion dances, and red packet (angpow) giving.
Chinese New Year.description_ms: Perayaan Tahun Baru Lunar menandakan permulaan kalendar Cina. Keluarga berkumpul untuk makan malam reunion, tarian singa, dan pemberian angpow.

Thaipusam.description: Hindu festival honoring Lord Murugan. Devotees carry kavadi (ornate structures) and perform acts of devotion at Batu Caves, the largest celebration outside India.
Thaipusam.description_ms: Perayaan Hindu menghormati Dewa Murugan. Para penganut membawa kavadi dan melakukan ibadat di Batu Caves.

Federal Territory Day.description: Commemorates the transfer of Kuala Lumpur to the federal government on 1 February 1974. Observed in KL, Putrajaya, and Labuan only.
Federal Territory Day.description_ms: Memperingati penyerahan Kuala Lumpur kepada kerajaan persekutuan pada 1 Februari 1974.

Israk and Mikraj.description: Commemorates Prophet Muhammad's night journey from Mecca to Jerusalem and ascension to heaven. A significant event in Islamic faith.
Israk and Mikraj.description_ms: Memperingati perjalanan malam Nabi Muhammad dari Mekah ke Baitul Maqdis dan kenaikan ke langit.

Nuzul Al-Quran.description: Commemorates the day the first verses of the Quran were revealed to Prophet Muhammad during Ramadan.
Nuzul Al-Quran.description_ms: Memperingati hari wahyu pertama Al-Quran diturunkan kepada Nabi Muhammad semasa bulan Ramadan.

Hari Raya Aidilfitri.description: Celebrates the end of Ramadan fasting month. Families gather for prayers, festive meals of ketupat and rendang, and open houses welcoming all races.
Hari Raya Aidilfitri.description_ms: Meraikan tamatnya bulan puasa Ramadan. Keluarga berkumpul untuk solat, hidangan ketupat dan rendang, dan rumah terbuka.
Hari Raya Aidilfitri.greeting_ms: Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri, Maaf Zahir dan Batin

Labour Day.description: International Workers' Day celebrating the achievements of workers and the labor movement.
Labour Day.description_ms: Hari Pekerja Antarabangsa meraikan pencapaian pekerja dan gerakan buruh.

Wesak Day.description: Celebrates the birth, enlightenment, and death of Gautama Buddha. Devotees visit temples, meditate, and release caged birds and animals.
Wesak Day.description_ms: Meraikan kelahiran, pencerahan, dan kematian Gautama Buddha. Penganut mengunjungi kuil dan melepaskan burung.

Yang di-Pertuan Agong's Birthday.name_ms: Hari Keputeraan Seri Paduka Baginda Yang di-Pertuan Agong
Yang di-Pertuan Agong's Birthday.description: Official birthday of the King of Malaysia. Celebrated on the first Monday of June with a royal ceremony and awards investiture at Istana Negara.
Yang di-Pertuan Agong's Birthday.description_ms: Hari keputeraan rasmi Yang di-Pertuan Agong. Disambut dengan upacara penganugerahan darjah kebesaran.

Hari Raya Haji.name_ms: Hari Raya Haji / Hari Raya Korban
Hari Raya Haji.description: Festival of sacrifice marking the end of Hajj pilgrimage. Muslims perform qurban (animal sacrifice) and distribute meat to the community.
Hari Raya Haji.description_ms: Perayaan korban menandakan tamatnya ibadat haji. Umat Islam melakukan korban dan mengagihkan daging.

Awal Muharram.description: Islamic New Year marking the first day of Muharram and commemorating Prophet Muhammad's migration (hijrah) from Mecca to Medina.
Awal Muharram.description_ms: Tahun Baru Islam menandakan hari pertama Muharram dan memperingati penghijrahan Nabi Muhammad dari Mekah ke Madinah.

Maulidur Rasul.description: Celebrates the birthday of Prophet Muhammad. Processions and religious lectures are held nationwide.
Maulidur Rasul.description_ms: Meraikan kelahiran Nabi Muhammad. Perarakan dan ceramah agama diadakan di seluruh negara.

National Day.description: Celebrates the independence of the Federation of Malaya on 31 August 1957. Marked by the 'Merdeka' (Freedom) cry and patriotic celebrations.
National Day.description_ms: Meraikan kemerdekaan Persekutuan Tanah Melayu pada 31 Ogos 1957. Ditandai dengan laungan 'Merdeka' dan sambutan patriotik.

Malaysia Day.description: Commemorates the formation of Malaysia on 16 September 1963 when Malaya, Sabah, Sarawak, and Singapore united.
Malaysia Day.description_ms: Memperingati penubuhan Malaysia pada 16 September 1963 apabila Tanah Melayu, Sabah, Sarawak, dan Singapura bergabung.

Deepavali.description: Festival of Lights celebrating the triumph of good over evil, light over darkness. Homes are decorated with oil lamps (diyas) and kolam patterns.
Deepavali.description_ms: Perayaan Cahaya meraikan kemenangan kebaikan atas kejahatan. Rumah dihiasi dengan pelita minyak dan corak kolam.

Christmas Day.description: Celebrates the birth of Jesus Christ. Shopping malls feature elaborate decorations and Malaysians of all races enjoy the festive atmosphere.
Christmas Day.description_ms: Meraikan kelahiran Yesus Kristus. Pusat beli-belah dihiasi meriah dan rakyat Malaysia semua kaum menikmati suasana perayaan.

Good Friday.description: Commemorates the crucifixion of Jesus Christ. Observed as a state holiday in Sabah and Sarawak only.
Good Friday.description_ms: Memperingati penyaliban Yesus Kristus. Diperhatikan sebagai cuti negeri di Sabah dan Sarawak sahaja.

Gawai Day.description: Sarawak's harvest festival celebrated by the Dayak people. Features traditional longhouse gatherings, tuak (rice wine), and ngajat dances.
Gawai Day.description_ms: Perayaan penuaian Sarawak disambut oleh masyarakat Dayak. Menampilkan perjumpaan di rumah panjang, tuak, dan tarian ngajat.

Harvest Festival.description: Sabah's harvest festival celebrated by the Kadazandusun people. Features the Unduk Ngadau beauty pageant and traditional sumazau dance.
Harvest Festival.description_ms: Perayaan penuaian Sabah disambut oleh masyarakat Kadazandusun. Menampilkan pertandingan Unduk Ngadau dan tarian sumazau.

Sarawak Day.description: Commemorates Sarawak's independence from British rule on 22 July 1963, before joining Malaysia.
Sarawak Day.description_ms: Memperingati kemerdekaan Sarawak daripada penjajahan British pada 22 Julai 1963.
